---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<div class="hero-grid">
  <div class="hero-text">

# Sophia Sufei Chen

<div class="hero-subtitle">Final-Year Business Studies Student | Business Analytics | Marketing Strategy | Process Improvement</div>

I am a final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University with a strong interest in business analysis, marketing planning, and operational improvement. Through academic projects and internship experience, I have developed practical skills in commercial thinking, structured problem-solving, and professional communication.

[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}

  </div>

  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Sophia Sufei Chen profile photo">
  </div>
</div>

## Profile Highlights

<div class="highlight-grid">
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <strong>Business Analytics</strong><br>
    Academic focus on structured analysis, decision-making, and business insight.
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <strong>Marketing Planning</strong><br>
    Experience developing customer-focused strategy and value propositions.
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <strong>Accounting & ACCA</strong><br>
    Practical finance exposure through internship experience and ACCA studies.
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <strong>Process Improvement</strong><br>
    Strong interest in operational efficiency, cost analysis, and profitability.
  </div>
</div>

## Welcome

<div class="section-card">
This ePortfolio presents my academic background, project experience, and professional interests. It highlights my work in business analysis, marketing strategy, operational improvement, and customer-focused business development.
</div>
